podcast: [The wildlife sanctuary you can visit from anywhere | Maya Higa] Creator Maya Higa is on a mission to use the internet to build the next generation of conservationists. Her virtual education center, Alveus Sanctuary, is one of the most-watched sanctuaries on Earth, with dozens of rescued animals and cameras livestreaming to a community of millions inspired to help protect the wildlife. Visit with Bean the Hawk, Winnie the Moo and more — and see what the future

youtube_items.title: [YT] 2025 UNESCO Confucius Prize for Literacy highlights global education efforts
youtube_items.summary: A celebration of both heritage and humanity. The 20th UNESCO Confucious Prize for Literacy ceremony took place in Chu Fu, hometown of the ancient Chinese philosopher. This year's awards recognize three projects from Bangladesh, Ireland, and Morocco for their outstanding contributions to inclusive education. >> Thank you. >> We believe that people should have the right to have their literacy needs met. Um and by having this prize it gives international recognition for that work but also will help us to fund and sustain the work in the years to come. It gives up lot of strength. Hopefully uh we will be able to scale up more communities and internationally in other countries. >> Founded 20 years ago. The UNESCO Confucious Prize for Literacy honors individuals and institution
